markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.

markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the Houston vs Texas game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026 at 2:35 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Texas wins the Houston vs Texas professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026 at 2:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Houston vs Texas professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026 at 2:35 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Washington is the first NFL team to announce the sale, transfer, or divestiture of an ownership stake in the team (whether controlling or minority) after Issuance and before Jul 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The sale, transfer, or divestiture of an ownership stake (whether controlling or minority) in an NFL team is deemed to occur upon the first formal, official public announcement of the action by its ownership, the Governing League, or any of the Source Agencies. 
In order to be eligible for resolution, the announcement must report the action as confirmed and finalized (not merely rumored or under negotiation), regardless of whether the transaction has yet closed or received all the requisite approvals.
If no NFL team sells, transfers, or divests an ownership stake in their team (whether controlling or minority) after Issuance and before Jul 1, 2027, then the market titled "No Team" resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will the Washington Pro Football team be the next Pro Football team to sell an ownership stake after Issuance and before Jul 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Kusuhara / Nakagawa wins the Kusuhara / Nakagawa vs Jeong / Matsuda professional tennis match in the 2026 M15 Tokyo Semifinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Kusuhara / Nakagawa vs Jeong / Matsuda professional tennis match in the 2026 M15 Tokyo Semifinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If any player on either team does not participate in the match, even if a replacement plays and the match still takes place with some of the original players/teams, the event is considered a different match and all markets will be settled at $0.50. If a player/team withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that team will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Kusuhara / Nakagawa win the Kusuhara / Nakagawa vs Jeong / Matsuda: M15 Tokyo Semifinal match?

If Janson Junk is scratched or is not a starting pitcher, the market will resolve to the fair market price.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the executive action is issued.
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump has taken any executive action renaming U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement to a name abbreviated NICE (such as National Immigration and Customs Enforcement) in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The qualifying action must be of the specific type designated (executive order, presidential memorandum, proclamation, directive, determination, or finding), be signed by the President personally during the specified time period, and explicitly address the topic in the document's operative provisions, title, or official White House summary. Actions must have legal or policy effect - ceremonial proclamations without policy impact do not qualify unless specifically included. Actions that only incidentally mention the topic, statements without formal action, actions by cabinet members, legislative proposals without executive action, and signing statements do not qualify. The action must be publicly announced or documented by a Source Agency before expiration.
markets.title: Will Donald Trump issue any executive action on renaming U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement to a name abbreviated NICE (such as National Immigration and Customs Enforcement) during in 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the law is enacted
markets.rules_primary: If legislation establishing the Canada Strong Fund has become law in Canada before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
“Legislation establishing the Canada Strong Fund” means an Act of Parliament that creates, incorporates, or grants statutory authority for the Canada Strong Fund, or for a Crown corporation or substantially similar federal entity whose stated purpose is to operate the Canada Strong Fund.

Enactment requires completion of all constitutional and legal requirements for the legislation to become binding law.

Standard legislation requiring executive approval: final passage by all required legislative bodies, executive signature OR becoming law despite executive inaction OR successful veto override, and satisfaction of any required waiting periods
Legislation not requiring executive approval: final passage and completion of required waiting periods
Constitutional amendments: passage with required supermajorities and completion of ratification processes
Executive orders: official signature, publication in official government records, and legal effectiveness

The following do NOT constitute enactment:

Legislative passage without completed executive action
Passage by only some required bodies
Provisional passage
Non-binding resolutions
Draft orders

Enactment occurs when all requirements are completed, regardless of pending judicial challenges.
markets.title: Will X become law in Canada before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.rules_primary: If Wes Streeting formally holds the position of UK Foreign Secretary before Jan 1, 2027, and is the first such subject to do so after Issuance, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The holder of the position at the time of Issuance is excluded. For the purposes of this Contract, only a subject who holds the position in a permanent, confirmed, elected, or otherwise non-acting and non-temporary capacity—as formally designated by the body or organization at which the position is held—is treated as formally holding the position; assumption of the role solely in an acting, interim, transitional, provisional, caretaker, pro tempore, or otherwise temporary capacity does not, by itself, satisfy the Payout Criterion.
markets.title: Will Wes Streeting be the next UK Foreign Secretary before Jan 1, 2027?
